emails.subject: Re: PG&E strategy
emails.body: Yes, agree that another call to weave in the comments we received from the biz units would be useful. Can we shoot for Wednesday, when Mr. Kaufman will be here in the SF office? Harry Kingerski 09/25/2000 08:58 AM
